title: paronychia velata var. subvelata
intro: Paronychia velata var. subvelata is a variety of the Paronychia velata plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae. It is also known as the "sticky-fruit night-blooming cactus" or "sticky pear night-blooming cactus", and is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Paronychia velata var. subvelata include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent, making it useful in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to promote wound healing, soothe skin irritations, and provide relief from minor injuries.
